text: I feel a sense of curiosity and contemplation being here. The open, minimalist lounge invites relaxation and introspection, while the colorful R+D exhibit sparks my intellectual interest. There is a tension between the quiet simplicity of the seating area and the stimulating, informative environment of the exhibit. I feel both calm and mentally engaged, as if invited to reflect on the space around me and on my own place within this dialogue between human creativity and technological innovation.
